title: Luffy Challenges Laboon
description: On pages 9–12, luffy challenges laboon as the Straw Hats collide with Laboon, a gigantic whale guarding the entrance to the Grand Line, and Luffy is separated inside it.
scene: Luffy Challenges Laboon. The Straw Hats collide with Laboon, a gigantic whale guarding the entrance to the Grand Line, and Luffy is separated inside it. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Just shut the hell up already!
